summary: Build sacred_texts.py downloader (handles their specific HTML layout)
description:
## Goal

Build the sacred-texts.com downloader to handle their specific HTML layout with navigation, footnotes, and ads that must be stripped.

## Responsibilities

- Handle sacred-texts.com HTML structure
- Strip navigation, footnotes, ads
- Handle multi-page texts (Corpus Hermeticum has one page per tractate)
- Extract clean plaintext

## Output

- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.txt — clean plaintext
- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.meta.toml — provenance metadata

## Implementation Details

- sacred-texts.com uses specific div classes for content
- Need to identify and strip sidebar navigation
- Handle inline footnotes (may need special processing)
- For html_multi format: parse index page, follow links, extract each tractate

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1: Corpus Acquisition
